Data Scientist.title: Programming Foundation
Data Scientist.desc: Master Python (NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib). Learn R basics.

Data Scientist.title: Mathematics & Statistics
Data Scientist.desc: Linear algebra, probability, statistics, hypothesis testing, A/B testing.

Data Scientist.title: Machine Learning
Data Scientist.desc: Supervised & unsupervised learning with scikit-learn. Master regression, classification, clustering.

Data Scientist.title: Deep Learning
Data Scientist.desc: Neural networks, CNNs, RNNs with TensorFlow/PyTorch. Study Transformers.

Data Scientist.title: NLP & Computer Vision
Data Scientist.desc: Text processing with spaCy/NLTK, BERT fine-tuning, image classification.

Data Scientist.title: Data Engineering
Data Scientist.desc: SQL, ETL pipelines, cloud storage (AWS S3, BigQuery). Learn dbt.

Data Scientist.title: Model Deployment
Data Scientist.desc: REST APIs with FastAPI/Flask, Docker containers, MLflow experiment tracking.

Data Scientist.title: Portfolio & Kaggle
Data Scientist.desc: Build 3–5 end-to-end projects. Compete on Kaggle. Publish on GitHub.

Web Developer.title: HTML & CSS Fundamentals
Web Developer.desc: Semantic HTML5, CSS3, Flexbox, Grid, responsive design, accessibility.

Web Developer.title: JavaScript Mastery
Web Developer.desc: ES6+, DOM, async/await, fetch API, modules, TypeScript basics.

Web Developer.title: Frontend Framework
Web Developer.desc: Pick React or Vue or Angular. Learn state management (Redux/Pinia/NgRx).

Web Developer.title: Backend Development
Web Developer.desc: Node.js + Express, RESTful APIs, authentication (JWT, OAuth).

Web Developer.title: DevOps Basics
Web Developer.desc: Git/GitHub, CI/CD pipelines, Docker basics, Vercel/Netlify deployment.

Web Developer.title: Performance & Security
Web Developer.desc: Web vitals, lazy loading, HTTPS, CORS, XSS/CSRF prevention, CSP headers.

Web Developer.title: Build Projects
Web Developer.desc: Ship 3 full-stack projects. Contribute to open source. Build your portfolio site.

DevOps Engineer.title: Linux & Scripting
DevOps Engineer.desc: Linux administration, bash scripting, cron jobs, file systems, networking.

DevOps Engineer.title: Version Control & CI/CD
DevOps Engineer.desc: Git mastery, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins pipelines.

DevOps Engineer.title: Containers
DevOps Engineer.desc: Docker (build, run, compose). Understand container registries and security.

DevOps Engineer.title: Container Orchestration
DevOps Engineer.desc: Kubernetes (pods, services, deployments, Helm charts, namespaces).

DevOps Engineer.title: Infrastructure as Code
DevOps Engineer.desc: Terraform for provisioning, Ansible for configuration management.

DevOps Engineer.title: Cloud Platforms
DevOps Engineer.desc: AWS (EC2, S3, EKS, RDS, IAM) or Azure/GCP equivalents. Get certified.

DevOps Engineer.title: Monitoring & Observability
DevOps Engineer.desc: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, alerting, log aggregation, tracing.

DevOps Engineer.title: Security & Compliance
DevOps Engineer.desc: DevSecOps, secret management (Vault), SAST/DAST, network security.

Data Analyst.title: Excel Mastery
Data Analyst.desc: VLOOKUP, pivot tables, power query, charts. Excel is the foundation.

Data Analyst.title: SQL
Data Analyst.desc: SELECT, JOINs, GROUP BY, subqueries, window functions, CTEs.

Data Analyst.title: Data Visualization
Data Analyst.desc: Tableau or Power BI (DAX). Design dashboards that tell a story.

Data Analyst.title: Python for Analytics
Data Analyst.desc: Pandas for data wrangling, Matplotlib/Seaborn for charts, Jupyter notebooks.

Data Analyst.title: Statistics
Data Analyst.desc: Descriptive stats, distributions, hypothesis testing, regression basics.

Data Analyst.title: Business Acumen
Data Analyst.desc: KPIs, cohort analysis, funnel analysis, A/B testing, storytelling with data.

Data Analyst.title: Cloud & Big Data Basics
Data Analyst.desc: BigQuery, Snowflake, AWS Redshift basics. Learn dbt for transformations.

Data Analyst.title: Communication & Portfolio
Data Analyst.desc: Present analysis clearly. Build a portfolio with real business insights.

Backend Developer.title: Programming Language
Backend Developer.desc: Deep-dive: Python (Django/FastAPI), Java (Spring Boot), or Node.js (Express).

Backend Developer.title: Databases
Backend Developer.desc: SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL) + NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis). Master query optimization.

Backend Developer.title: API Design
Backend Developer.desc: REST APIs (versioning, pagination, auth). GraphQL basics. OpenAPI/Swagger docs.

Backend Developer.title: Authentication & Security
Backend Developer.desc: JWT, OAuth2, session management, rate limiting, input validation.

Backend Developer.title: Caching & Messaging
Backend Developer.desc: Redis caching, Celery tasks, message queues (RabbitMQ/Kafka).

Backend Developer.title: Containerization
Backend Developer.desc: Docker, docker-compose. Understand multi-stage builds and secrets.

Backend Developer.title: System Design
Backend Developer.desc: Scalability, load balancing, microservices architecture, distributed systems.

Backend Developer.title: Production Skills
Backend Developer.desc: CI/CD, logging, monitoring, cloud deployment (AWS/GCP). Code reviews.

Mobile Developer.title: Choose Your Platform
Mobile Developer.desc: Android (Kotlin + Jetpack Compose) or iOS (Swift + SwiftUI) or cross-platform (Flutter/React Native).

Mobile Developer.title: UI Development
Mobile Developer.desc: Layouts, navigation, lists, animations. Follow platform design guidelines (Material/HIG).

Mobile Developer.title: State Management
Mobile Developer.desc: MVVM, BLoC, Redux, Provider. Understand reactive programming.

Mobile Developer.title: Networking
Mobile Developer.desc: REST APIs with Retrofit/Alamofire/Axios. JSON parsing. Error handling.

Mobile Developer.title: Firebase & Backend
Mobile Developer.desc: Firebase Auth, Firestore, FCM push notifications, Analytics.

Mobile Developer.title: Testing & Publishing
Mobile Developer.desc: Unit tests, UI tests. Publish to Play Store & App Store. CI/CD with Fastlane.

Mobile Developer.title: Advanced Topics
Mobile Developer.desc: Offline-first architecture, performance optimization, accessibility, deep links.

Cybersecurity Analyst.title: Networking Fundamentals
Cybersecurity Analyst.desc: TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP, firewalls, VPNs. Use Wireshark to analyze traffic.

Cybersecurity Analyst.title: Linux Mastery
Cybersecurity Analyst.desc: Linux command line, file permissions, processes, Bash scripting. Use Kali Linux.

Cybersecurity Analyst.title: Ethical Hacking Basics
Cybersecurity Analyst.desc: OWASP Top 10, Nmap, Metasploit, Burp Suite. Practice on HackTheBox/TryHackMe.

Cybersecurity Analyst.title: Security Operations
Cybersecurity Analyst.desc: SOC workflows, SIEM (Splunk/QRadar), log analysis, alert triage.

Cybersecurity Analyst.title: Penetration Testing
Cybersecurity Analyst.desc: Web app, network, and mobile pentesting. Reporting vulnerabilities professionally.

Cybersecurity Analyst.title: Incident Response
Cybersecurity Analyst.desc: Digital forensics, memory analysis, malware triage, IR playbooks.

Cybersecurity Analyst.title: Cloud Security
Cybersecurity Analyst.desc: AWS/Azure IAM, zero trust, CSPM tools. Understand cloud threat models.

Cybersecurity Analyst.title: Certifications
Cybersecurity Analyst.desc: Pursue CompTIA Security+, CEH, OSCP, CISSP. Build a home lab.

Cloud Engineer.title: Cloud Fundamentals
Cloud Engineer.desc: Understand IaaS/PaaS/SaaS. Pick AWS or Azure or GCP. Get free tier account.

Cloud Engineer.title: Infrastructure as Code
Cloud Engineer.desc: Terraform for multi-cloud provisioning. Learn modules and state management.

Cloud Engineer.title: Containers & Orchestration
Cloud Engineer.desc: Docker + Kubernetes (EKS/AKS/GKE). Helm charts, namespaces, autoscaling.

Cloud Engineer.title: Serverless
Cloud Engineer.desc: AWS Lambda, Azure Functions, Cloud Run. Event-driven architectures.

Cloud Engineer.title: Networking & Security
Cloud Engineer.desc: VPCs, subnets, security groups, WAF, load balancers, CDN, DNS.

Cloud Engineer.title: Monitoring & Cost
Cloud Engineer.desc: CloudWatch/Azure Monitor, cost optimization (Reserved Instances, spot), FinOps.

Cloud Engineer.title: Certifications
Cloud Engineer.desc: AWS Solutions Architect / Azure Administrator / GCP ACE. Then specializations.

ML Engineer.title: ML Foundations
ML Engineer.desc: Python, scikit-learn, pandas, statistics, model evaluation. Understand the full ML lifecycle.

ML Engineer.title: Deep Learning
ML Engineer.desc: TensorFlow or PyTorch. CNNs, RNNs, Transformers, fine-tuning pre-trained models.

ML Engineer.title: Data Pipelines
ML Engineer.desc: Apache Airflow, Spark/PySpark, feature stores (Feast). ETL at scale.

ML Engineer.title: Model Serving
ML Engineer.desc: REST APIs (FastAPI/Flask), TF Serving, Triton Inference Server, ONNX.

ML Engineer.title: MLOps Tooling
ML Engineer.desc: MLflow (tracking, registry), DVC, Weights & Biases, experiment management.

ML Engineer.title: Containerization & Orchestration
ML Engineer.desc: Docker, Kubernetes, Kubeflow. Scalable model training and deployment.

ML Engineer.title: Cloud ML Platforms
ML Engineer.desc: AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, Azure ML. Managed training and deployment.

ML Engineer.title: LLMs & Advanced Topics
ML Engineer.desc: Fine-tuning LLMs, RAG pipelines, vector databases, prompt engineering.

Database Administrator.title: SQL Mastery
Database Administrator.desc: Advanced SQL: window functions, CTEs, stored procedures, triggers, indexes.

Database Administrator.title: Database Internals
Database Administrator.desc: Storage engines, query planners, execution plans, ACID properties, transactions.

Database Administrator.title: Performance Tuning
Database Administrator.desc: Index optimization, query rewriting, EXPLAIN ANALYZE, caching, connection pooling.

Database Administrator.title: Backup & Recovery
Database Administrator.desc: Full/incremental backups, point-in-time recovery, RTO/RPO planning, testing restores.

Database Administrator.title: Replication & HA
Database Administrator.desc: Primary-replica setup, failover, load balancing (pgBouncer, ProxySQL).

Database Administrator.title: NoSQL Databases
Database Administrator.desc: MongoDB, Redis, Cassandra. Understand CAP theorem and when to use NoSQL.

Database Administrator.title: Cloud Databases
Database Administrator.desc: AWS RDS/Aurora, Azure SQL, GCP Cloud SQL, Snowflake, BigQuery.

Database Administrator.title: Security & Compliance
Database Administrator.desc: Encryption at rest/transit, auditing, RBAC, GDPR/HIPAA compliance, data masking.
